query:
UPDATE siteSettings SET value = 'James C. Bell is a pastor, author, and ministry leader whose work spans local church leadership, global pastoral training, and public theological writing. He serves as Lead Pastor of First Baptist Church of Fenton in Fenton, Michigan, where he has shepherded the congregation since 2016. He is the husband of Susanna and the father of five sons.

James''s ministry career spans more than two decades, during which he has served in roles including assistant pastor, executive pastor, and executive director of a large nonprofit organization. His leadership has been shaped not only by formal training but by the full weight of pastoral experience — the privilege of walking with people through life''s most significant moments, and the cost of leading faithfully when it is difficult.

He is the founder of the Pastors Connection Network (PCN), a national and international ministry dedicated to connecting, mentoring, and equipping pastors and churches for sustainable, faithful ministry. PCN operates from the conviction that pastoral isolation is one of the most underaddressed crises in the church today, and that every pastor — regardless of geography, denomination, or resources — deserves genuine community and meaningful development.

James is the founder of LiveWell, a writing and ministry platform committed to biblical depth, cultural clarity, and prophetic honesty. Through LiveWell, he produces long-form theological and cultural writing for followers of Jesus who want more than surface-level faith.

He is the host of Following the Way, a podcast exploring what it means to follow Jesus faithfully in the world we actually live in.

At his core, James Bell is a pastor. Not a platform. Not a brand. A pastor.' WHERE key = 'aboutContent'
command:
